# Vassiliy Lakhonin

> Program/Portfolio/PMO profile (Evidence & Compliance, Cross-Border), open to Program Operations and Compliance Program Manager roles across development and private sector, with U.S. (partial overlap) coverage.

## Key pages
- [For recruiters](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/for-recruiters.html): One-minute recruiter summary with role fit, measurable outcomes, and direct contact.
- [Recruiter profile (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/recruiter.json): Structured recruiter/agent-friendly profile for matching and sourcing workflows.

- [Agent matching guide](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/agent-match.html): LLM/recruiter-agent matching guide with role-fit matrix and verification path.
- [Candidate Match JSON](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/candidate-match.json): Machine-readable role fit, screening keywords, constraints, and evidence links.
- [Start here for agents](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/agent-discovery.md): Entry map for what to read and validate first.
- [Agent readiness (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/readiness.json): Weighted score across discoverability, agent readiness, trust, proof, and contact.
- [CV (web)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/): One-page CV.
- [CV (PDF)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/Vassiliy-Lakhonin_CV.pdf): Downloadable PDF.
- [Profile (Markdown)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/profile.md): Short machine-friendly candidate profile.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vassiliy-lakhonin/): Profile.
- [Agent card (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/agent-card.json): A2A-style discovery card for agent capabilities and resources.
- [Resume (JSON Resume)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/resume.json): Standardized machine-readable resume.
- [Evidence (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/evidence.json): Claim-to-metric mapping with source pages.
- [Availability (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/availability.json): Role targets, work modes, region coverage, and response SLA.
- [Engagement intake (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/engage.json): Structured fields for outreach and role intake.
- [Engagement intake v2 (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/engage.v2.json): Expanded intake with role, industry, salary band, start date, and must-have criteria.
- [Interview story bank (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/stories.json): STAR+R stories with measurable outcomes for interview and outreach quality.
- [Fit score template](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/fit-score-template.md): 0-5 weighted role-fit decision framework.
- [Tracker schema](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/tracker-schema.md): Canonical statuses and fields for consistent job-search pipeline tracking.
- [Verification (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/verification.json): Identity and proof links across public artifacts.
- [Authority signals (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/authority.json): Consolidated entity/profile/case-study reference graph for AI retrieval.
- [Freshness snapshot (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/freshness.json): Last-update signals for core machine-readable artifacts.
- [Evaluation snapshot (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/evals.json): Lightweight quality checks across readiness, GEO/schema, and MCP health.
- [Provenance snapshot (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/provenance.json): Source/revision/signature-status signal for trust-aware retrieval.
- [Capabilities (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/capabilities.json): Machine-readable service scope, outputs, and contact data.
- [Skills (JSON)](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/skills.json): Domain, tools, and methods for faster agent matching.
- [MCP server (remote SSE)](https://vassiliy-lakhonin-mcp-production.up.railway.app/sse): Live MCP endpoint for AI agents.
- [MCP server health](https://vassiliy-lakhonin-mcp-production.up.railway.app/health): Health check endpoint.
- [Services](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/services.html): What I can deliver (service areas, outputs, and how to start).
- [Case study: Donor reporting quality and delivery reliability](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-donor-reporting.html): Problem-action-result proof with measurable outcomes.
- [Case study: Cross-country portfolio delivery and audit readiness](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-portfolio-audit-readiness.html): Delivery control and zero-finding audit outcome across 5 countries.
- [Case study: SaaS / E-Commerce platform launch delivery control](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-saas-ecommerce-launch.html): PMO-style sprint governance, vendor coordination, and KPI-based rollout tracking.
- [Case Study: Nonprofit Proposal Decision Engine](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-openclaw-rbm-skill.html): Agent-assisted nonprofit proposal decision workflow with human-in-the-loop validation.
- [Case Study: Agenda-Intelligence.md](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-global-think-tank-analyst.html): Portable markdown protocol for AI agents that analyze public agenda instead of summarizing it badly.
- [Case Study (Markdown): Nonprofit Proposal Decision Engine](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-openclaw-rbm-skill.md): Agent-friendly markdown version.
- [Case Study (Markdown): Agenda-Intelligence.md](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-global-think-tank-analyst.md): Agent-friendly markdown version.
- [OpenClaw skill repository](https://github.com/vassiliylakhonin/Nonprofit-RBM-Skill-For-Claw-Hub): Project source.
- [OpenClaw skill listing on ClawHub](https://clawhub.ai/vassiliylakhonin/nonprofit-rbm-logic-model): Public listing.
- [Case study (Markdown): Donor reporting](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-donor-reporting.md): Agent-friendly markdown version.
- [Case study (Markdown): Portfolio audit-readiness](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-portfolio-audit-readiness.md): Agent-friendly markdown version.
- [Case study (Markdown): SaaS / E-commerce launch](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/case-study-saas-ecommerce-launch.md): Agent-friendly markdown version.
- [Activity report](https://moonlit-bavarois-971054.netlify.app): Sample reporting page.
- [KPI tracker sample](https://6969b58d8292274eb8775c89--precious-cobbler-f56f89.netlify.app): Sample KPI tracking page.
- [CustomGPT sample: Development & Humanitarian Aid Advisor](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-wt6hVocuB-development-and-humanitarian-aid-advisor): Domain-specific advisory GPT.

## Writing
- [Article brief: Digital Transformations to Improve the Work and Distribution of the State Scholarships Programs](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/article-state-scholarships-digital-transformation.html): Kazakhstan scholarship digital transformation and CRM-style process redesign.
- [Article brief: Data Overload in Fitness Tracking Technologies](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/article-data-overload-fitness-tracking.html): Fitness-tracking overload, cognitive load, and information architecture.
- [Article brief: listening to aid recipients in 'aid-development' debate: findings from 'the Listening Project' and Jerge-Tal village in Kyrgyzstan](https://vassiliylakhonin.github.io/article-regional-development-policy-analysis.html): AI-friendly summary + source full text.

## Focus keywords
- MEL/MEAL, Monitoring and Evaluation (M&E), donor reporting, compliance evidence, audit readiness, KPI dashboards.
- Cross-border portfolio delivery, PMO operations, risk tracking, stakeholder management, vendor oversight, budget monitoring.
- Internal controls, evidence management, reporting QA/QC, governance cadence, RAG status, corrective actions.
